original:
"This was before," Pond says. "His people are still... they're everywhere. They'll kill me."

He looks at you hopefully. "You've got to help me."

"This was before," Pond says. "His people are still... they're everywhere. They'll kill me."

He looks at Bornanew hopefully. "You said you'd keep me safe. As a Knight."

$global.jethroName closes his eyes and sighs.

"This," Pond coughs violently, holding his throat, "-before. Pathers... everywhere. Kill me."

He looks at you fearfully after a glance at Bornanew. "... help me."

option_line: bffi_pondNoSedgeOutro2menesFool:"Go to Menes. Confess. He's fool enough to forgive you."
original: Go to Menes. Confess. He's fool enough to forgive you.

option_line: bffi_pondNoSedgeOutro2menesKind:"Go to Menes. Confess. He's kind enough to forgive you."
original: Go to Menes. Confess. He's kind enough to forgive you.

option_line: bffi_pondNoSedgeOutro2knights:"$global.jethroName, will the Knights take this man?"
original: $global.jethroName, will the Knights take this man?

option_line: bffi_pondNoSedgeOutro2deal:"You did this to yourself. Now deal with it."
original: You did this to yourself. Now deal with it.

Bornanew looks at you, then to Pond. Then speaks.

"I shall bring you to an agent of the Knights of Ludd. You shall confess all your sins, beginning first with that of heresy. They shall assign your penance."

Bornanew looks at you, then to Pond. Then he speaks.

"I shall bring you to an agent of the Knights of Ludd. You shall confess all your sins, beginning first with that of heresy. They shall assign your penance, and it will be as harsh as you deserve."

"But you will live."
